auth.name: Name
auth.minName: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address first.
auth.signUpSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to confirm.
auth.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Please wait {{seconds}} seconds.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pageSubtitle: Control center for profile, security, AI governance and enterprise configuration.
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and system configuration.
settings.onboardingDesc: Restart the guided tour to explore all areas.
settings.quietHoursDesc: No notifications between 10 PM – 7 AM. Escalations are still delivered.
settings.privacyDesc: AI only uses data from your workspace. Nothing is stored externally or used for training.
settings.slaConfigDesc: Escalation times and delegation rules per category and priority.
settings.delegationDesc: Set up a vacation delegate. Your pending reviews will be automatically forwarded.
settings.securityNote1: 2FA will be supported in a future version
settings.featureFlagsDesc: Enable or disable modules. Disabled modules disappear from navigation.
settings.roleManagement: Role management is done via user management.
settings.passwordMinError: Password must be at least 6 characters.
settings.mentionsDesc: Get notified when you are mentioned in comments or chats
settings.deadlinesDesc: Reminders before decision and task deadlines expire
settings.statusChangesDesc: Updates when the status of decisions affecting you changes
settings.digestDesc: How would you like to receive non-critical notifications?
settings.execDigestDailyDesc: Summary of all open decisions and escalations
settings.execDigestMonthlyDesc: Risk trends, pattern analysis, economic impact
settings.aiOrgModelDesc: Choose the AI model used by default for your organization.
settings.aiModelAuto: Automatic (recommended) — Decivio selects based on task
settings.aiGovernanceScopeDesc: Control which functions the AI may perform.
settings.aiDataResidencyInfo: AI processes data exclusively in the EU data center. No data is shared with third parties. All model interactions are ephemeral and not used for training.
settings.auditIntegrityDesc: Verify the cryptographic hash chain of the entire audit trail (SHA-256).
settings.auditIntact: Audit trail is intact — no tampering detected.
settings.auditPdfSecured: This audit trail is cryptographically secured. Verification code:
settings.brandingDesc: Control the Decivio footer in PDF exports.
settings.brandingHide: Hide Decivio branding in PDF exports
settings.brandingHideDesc: Removes 'Created with Decivio' from the footer of all PDF documents.
settings.brandingFreeHint: Branding cannot be disabled on the Free plan. Upgrade to Starter or higher.
settings.referralDesc: Refer Decivio and earn 20% commission on the first 12 months.
settings.referralCommissionDesc: 20% of the first 12 months — paid monthly via SEPA from €50 balance.
settings.referralPayoutInfo: Commission is released after 30 days of active usage by the referred customer.
settings.interfaceLanguageDesc: Controls the language of the user interface
settings.exportLanguageDesc: Language for PDF reports and board packs
settings.activeSessionsDesc: Manage your active browser sessions. Revoke suspicious sessions.
settings.whatsappDesc: Receive critical notifications directly via WhatsApp. Only for urgent events like review requests, escalations, and SLA violations.
settings.whatsappCodeInfo: A 6-digit code has been sent to {{phone}}.
settings.whatsappCriticalOnly: Critical events only — no regular updates.
settings.inboundDesc: Create decisions directly via email. Send an email to your dedicated address — subject becomes the title, body becomes the description.
settings.inboundEnabledDesc: Incoming emails are automatically created as decisions.
settings.inboundAllowedDomainsDesc: Only emails from these domains are accepted. Empty = all org members.
settings.inboundNoDomainsYet: No domains configured — all org members can send emails.
settings.teamsDesc: Receive decision notifications as Adaptive Cards directly in your Teams channel.
settings.teamsWebhookHint: Create an Incoming Webhook in your Teams channel and paste the URL here.
settings.teamsEnabledDesc: Send notifications as Adaptive Cards to Teams.
settings.teamsCardNew: New decision: Title, creator, priority, deadline, link
settings.teamsCardSla: SLA violation: Title, days overdue, Cost-of-Delay
settings.teamsV2Note: Approve/Reject buttons directly in Teams coming in Version 2.
settings.webhookDesc: Send real-time events to external systems. Every webhook is signed with HMAC-SHA256.
settings.webhookSelectEvents: Please select at least one event.
settings.webhookCreated: Webhook created. Store the secret token securely!
settings.webhookTestSent: Test event sent to all matching webhooks.
settings.webhookHmacInfo: Signed with HMAC-SHA256 in header X-Decivio-Signature

externalReview.expiredDesc: This review link is no longer valid (30-day limit).
externalReview.invalidDesc: Please use the link from the invitation email.

common.personalHint: Personal entries are only visible to you and do not appear in team analytics.

audit.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this change being made?
audit.reasonHint: The reason will be stored immutably in the audit trail.
audit.signatureAcknowledge: I hereby confirm that I authorize this action and accept full responsibility for its consequences.

decisions.externalInviteDesc: Generate a secure one-time link for a reviewer without a Decivio account.
decisions.externalLinkHint: The reviewer can comment, approve or reject without an account. Link expires after 30 days.
decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.subtitle: {{total}} decisions
decisions.helpDesc: Central workspace for all decisions. Each decision goes through: Draft → Review → Approved → Implemented. Use quick filters, bulk actions and AI analysis.
decisions.noDecisionsDesc: Create your first decision or load sample data to explore the platform.
decisions.confidentialWarning: Only selected people can see this decision. Owner and org admins always have access.
decisions.confidentialAdminNote: Owner, reviewers and org admins automatically have access and don't need to be added.
decisions.helpLifecycle: Each decision goes through: Draft → Review → Approved → Implemented. Rejected decisions are archived.
decisions.helpRisk: Automatically calculated by AI analysis based on context, category, and historical patterns. 0–100%, where >60% is considered high risk.
decisions.helpAlignment: Average of impact weights of all linked strategic goals. Higher = better aligned with strategy.
decisions.helpChips: Quick filters for critical states: Overdue (deadline exceeded), Escalated (SLA violated), Needs Review (your approval needed), High Risk (>60%), Blocked (open tasks).

detail.upgradeTooltip: Updates the template structure to v{{version}}. All existing data is preserved.
detail.openTasksWarning: {{count}} open tasks linked — these must be completed before the decision can be finalized.

edit.title: Edit Decision
edit.ownerHint: Owner is responsible for status, approval and sharing.
edit.confidentialDesc: Only owner, reviewers and org admins can see this decision
edit.changeReasonPlaceholder: Why is this change being made?
edit.changeReasonHint: Documented in the version history (governance requirement).

delete.title: Delete decision?
delete.description: "{{title}}" will be moved to trash. The decision can be restored from the archive. Audit entries are permanently retained.

new.templateDesc: Choose a template for structured governance or start freely.
new.recommendedTooltip: Based on historical success rates and team usage
new.ownerHint: Owner is responsible for status, approval and sharing.

dashboard.noContextDecisionsDesc: There are no decisions assigned to you yet. Create a new one or switch to the team view.
dashboard.readyDesc: Your Decision Operating System is ready.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Create your first decision or load sample data to explore the platform. Your KPIs, trends and insights will appear here.
dashboard.startSteps: Start in 3 steps: Create team → First decision → Start review
dashboard.firstDecisionDesc: Use a template for structured decisions
dashboard.advancedDesc: You have {{decisionCount}} decisions and {{implementedCount}} implemented — unlock intelligence features.
dashboard.trendBacklogGrowing: More created than completed decisions – backlog is growing.
dashboard.trendBacklogShrinking: Completion rate exceeds creation – backlog is shrinking.

calendar.title: Decision Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Drag & drop to move deadlines
calendar.help: See all decisions with due dates at a glance. Drag & drop to move deadlines. Unscheduled decisions are in the sidebar. ICS export available.

widgets.noOpenItems: No open escalations, reviews or overdue decisions.
widgets.noDataYetDesc: Create your first decision to populate the dashboard with data.
widgets.firstDecisionDesc: Create a structured decision with a template
widgets.startReviewProcessDesc: Add reviewers and start the approval process
widgets.exploreTemplatesDesc: Discover pre-built templates for various scenarios
widgets.delayCostDesc: Detailed delay costs of all open decisions (Draft/Review), calculated with team- or org-specific parameters.
widgets.teamRateFormula: Uses team hourly rate if available
widgets.noDelayCost: No delay costs — all decisions on track 🎉
widgets.velocityDesc: Average time from creation to implementation, broken down by category.
widgets.velocityAvgDays: Σ(implemented_at − created_at) / number of implemented decisions
widgets.velocityTrend: Compare avg velocity last 30 days vs. previous 30 days (±0.5d tolerance)
widgets.velocityCatBreakdown: Same formula, grouped by decision category
widgets.momentumMethodDesc: Aggregated health index (0–100) from 6 equally weighted factors. Each factor normalized to 0–17.
widgets.momentumSource: Internal calculation based on all decision and task data
widgets.recStatusUpdate: Request status update or initiate escalation
widgets.recAssignReviewer: Assign reviewer or start review flow

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Organizational Learning & Decision Intelligence
knowledge.help: Lessons learned from completed decisions. Pattern recognition, similarity engine and knowledge quality tracking.
knowledge.maturityTooltip: Based on: documentation rate, capture time, recommendation quality, repetition rate
knowledge.rejectedOf: of {{total}} decisions rejected – potential structural issue.
knowledge.documentationGap: Documentation gap – organizational knowledge is being lost.
knowledge.searchPlaceholder: Search decisions, learnings, takeaways or recommendations…
knowledge.noDecisionsDefault: Once decisions are implemented, they appear here.
knowledge.selectDecisionDesc: Select a completed decision on the left to see structured analysis, lessons and similar cases.
knowledge.keyTakeawayPlaceholder: What is the most important insight?
knowledge.recommendationsPlaceholder: What should be done differently next time?
knowledge.learningToActionDesc: Lessons flow back into the system: templates, automation rules or governance checklists.
knowledge.templateAdjustmentDesc: {{count}} recurring problems detected. Recommendation: add required fields or checklists to template.
knowledge.feedbackCopied: Template feedback copied – now paste in Template Editor
knowledge.noLessonsYet: No lessons yet. Create a Lesson Learned first.
knowledge.automationRuleToast: Create an automation rule based on this learning
knowledge.noTagsHint: Create new tags in the filter bar above.

teams.title: Teams
teams.helpDesc: Create teams and invite members via email. Decisions can be assigned to teams to clearly define responsibilities.
teams.emptyDesc: Teams enable collaborative decision-making with clear roles, SLA tracking, and review workflows.
teams.emptyStatistic: Teams with structured governance report significantly faster and better decisions.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Overview of all tasks
tasks.helpDesc: All tasks at a glance. Use filters and search to find what you need. Switch between list and kanban view.
tasks.emptyDesc: Link tasks to decisions and keep track of all action items.
tasks.emptyStatistic: Teams with structured task tracking report significantly more decisions implemented successfully.

briefing.title: Morning Brief
briefing.noData: No data available for the briefing yet.
briefing.exportPdfDesc: Contains: Momentum, delay costs, urgent actions, risks and recommendation.

analytics.hubHelp: Executive Control Center: KPIs, bottlenecks, risk, governance and decision quality at a glance.
analytics.executiveSnapshotTooltip: Exports KPIs, bottleneck analysis, risk distribution and governance status as PDF for board meetings.
analytics.notEnoughDataDesc: Analytics become meaningful from {{min}} decisions. You currently have {{current}}.
analytics.motivation: Teams with data-driven decision analysis report significantly shorter cycle times and better outcomes.
analytics.hint: Create more decisions to identify trends and patterns.
analytics.trendsDesc: Status distribution and velocity over time
analytics.noAnalysisDataDesc: Create decisions to activate the Executive Control Center.
analytics.noAnalysisDataHint: Data is automatically analyzed once decisions exist

executive.title: Executive Hub
executive.subtitle: C-Level cockpit with briefing, forecasts and scenarios
executive.help: Your management cockpit: AI-powered briefing, forecasts, cost analysis and strategic scenarios — everything at a glance for leadership decisions.
executive.emptyDesc: For meaningful C-Level analytics you need at least 15 decisions (currently {{current}}) and 3 implemented (currently {{implemented}}).
executive.emptyMotivation: Companies with systematic decision analysis report significantly better strategic decisions and fewer costly mistakes.
executive.emptyHint: Drive decisions to implementation to get forecasts and ROI data.

process.title: Process Intelligence
process.subtitle: Analyze bottlenecks, friction and governance
process.subtitleFull: Bottlenecks, friction and governance – Last 30 days
process.help: Systemic analysis of bottlenecks, SLA compliance, stakeholder friction and team interactions with prioritized actions.
process.emptyDesc: Process analyses become meaningful from 5 decisions. Currently: {{current}}.
process.emptyMotivation: Organizations that know their process bottlenecks resolve blockages significantly faster.
process.emptyHint: Use the system actively to identify bottlenecks and patterns.
process.bottleneckSubtitle: Systemic bottlenecks by status & review step

strategy.label: Strategy
strategy.title: Strategy Mapping
strategy.help: Link decisions to strategic goals (OKRs, KPIs, Revenue). Track progress and see which decisions have the greatest impact.
strategy.avgProgressTooltip: Average of all goal progress values: Each goal is calculated as a percentage (current ÷ target × 100), regardless of unit. The overall value is the mean across all goals.
strategy.noLinkedDecisions: No decisions linked yet. Open a decision and use the "Strategy" tab.
strategy.noGoalsDesc: Create OKRs, revenue goals or KPIs and link them to decisions.
strategy.sugSectionDesc: Choose fitting goal types for your team and adopt them with one click. Active goals are highlighted in green.
strategy.sugOkrDesc: Define ambitious goals with measurable results. Ideal for quarterly steering and cross-team alignment.
strategy.sugRevenueDesc: Revenue and growth targets with concrete values. Link decisions directly to financial outcomes.
strategy.sugKpiDesc: Track operational metrics like customer satisfaction, conversion rate, or SLA compliance in real-time.
strategy.sugQuarterlyDesc: Time-bound goals for a specific quarter. Perfect for short-term initiatives and sprint planning.

meetingTabs.selectForRoom: Select decisions for the Decision Room ({{count}} selected)

risk.title: Risk Register
risk.subtitle: Enterprise risk management: Assessment, linking, mitigation & economic exposure
risk.help: Capture risks, assess their probability and impact, and link them to decisions and tasks.
risk.heatmapCountTooltip: Shows the number of active risks per cell.
risk.heatmapEconomicTooltip: Shows the estimated economic exposure in euros.
risk.driversContribute: These {{count}} decisions contribute {{pct}}% of total risk.
risk.scenarioDesc: If critical risks are reduced by 1 likelihood level:
risk.emptyDesc: Capture risks, assess them with the heatmap, and link them to decisions and tasks.
risk.agingSignal: {{count}} risks open for >90 days — governance signal!
risk.mitigationHint: {{count}} risks without mitigation plan — document measures!

momentum.title: Momentum Score™
momentum.subtitle: 6-Factor Organizational Health
momentum.methodology: Aggregated health index (0–100) from 6 equally weighted factors. Each factor normalized to 0–17.
momentum.source: Internal calculation based on all decision and task data
momentum.recOverdueTasks: Complete {{count}} overdue tasks → task execution improves

escalationWidget.title: Escalations & Deadlines
escalationWidget.methodologyDesc: Shows unread notifications and overdue decisions. Escalation levels indicate urgency.
escalationWidget.overdueFormula: Status ∈ {Draft, Review, Approved} AND due_date < today
escalationWidget.levelFormula: Level 1 = low, Level 2 = medium (yellow), Level 3+ = critical (red)
escalationWidget.autoFormula: Triggered by check-escalations backend function based on SLA

radar.title: Decision Radar
radar.tooltip: Quick visual overview of the four key dimensions of your decision quality.

focusBanner.criticalBudget: {{count}} critical decisions jeopardize {{budget}} budget – {{violations}} SLA violations active
focusBanner.criticalTimeline: {{count}} critical decisions jeopardize your timeline – {{violations}} SLA violations active
focusBanner.overdueMsg: {{count}} overdue decisions – estimated cost from delays: {{cost}} (overdue only)
focusBanner.momentumDecline: Momentum declining – {{created}} new vs. {{completed}} completed decisions in 30 days

leaderboard.title: Contribution Overview
leaderboard.methodologyDesc: Team-level contribution overview by performance and speed. No ranking – just transparency.
leaderboard.makersFormula: Sorted by implemented decisions, then avg velocity
leaderboard.reviewersFormula: Sorted by reviews, then avg response time

roi.title: ROI — Before / After
roi.minDecisions: At least 5 decisions needed for ROI analysis.
roi.savingsDesc: with 15% speed improvement over the next 90 days

aiAnalysis.title: AI-Powered Analysis
aiAnalysis.emptyTitle: Start the AI analysis or use Autopilot for automatic action options.

impactTracker.notImplemented: Impact tracking is available once the decision has been implemented.
impactTracker.title: Impact Tracker — Prediction vs. Reality
impactTracker.outcomePlaceholder: What was the actual outcome of this decision? What worked, what didn't?

newDecision.templateIntro: Choose a template for structured governance or start freely.
newDecision.recommendedTooltip: Based on historical success rates and team usage
newDecision.ownerHint: Owner is responsible for status, approval and sharing.

whatIf.title: What-If Simulator
whatIf.emptyTitle: Add scenarios and let AI simulate the impacts.

coPilot.title: AI Decision Co-Pilot™
coPilot.emptyTitle: Start the Co-Pilot for delegation, reviewer and process recommendations.

strategyLink.title: Strategic Links
strategyLink.noGoalsHint: Create goals under "Strategy" and link them here.

dependencies.noLinksHint: Link this decision to tasks or other decisions.

scorecard.title: Decision Scorecard
scorecard.notAvailable: Scorecard is only available after implementation.
scorecard.goalDesc: Was the defined goal of the decision achieved?
scorecard.budgetDesc: Did the implementation stay within the planned budget?
scorecard.riskDesc: Does the AI risk assessment match reality?
scorecard.stakeholderDesc: Are the affected stakeholders satisfied with the outcome?
scorecard.notesPlaceholder: What went well? What would you do differently?

versionHistory.firstSnapshot: First snapshot – no previous version to compare.
versionHistory.noHistoryDesc: Versions are automatically created with each edit.

pir.title: Post-Implementation Review
pir.step0Desc: Compare the AI prediction with the actual outcome and document deviations.
pir.step1Desc: Document positive aspects, successful processes and strengths during implementation.
pir.step2Desc: Identify problems, bottlenecks and areas that could have been better.
pir.step3Desc: Summarize the key takeaway and provide recommendations for future decisions.
pir.step4Desc: Review your inputs before completing the review.
pir.outcomePlaceholder: What was the actual outcome? Which goals were achieved, which were not?
pir.wellPlaceholder: e.g. Fast implementation, clear communication, high stakeholder alignment...
pir.wrongPlaceholder: e.g. Delays due to missing resources, underestimated complexity...
pir.keyTakeawayPlaceholder: The central lesson from this decision...
pir.recommendationsPlaceholder: What should be done differently next time?

applyLearning.noResults: No similar learnings found. Try a more descriptive title.

nudges.missingStakeholdersCritical: Critical decisions without stakeholder buy-in fail 3× more often. Adding reviewers is recommended.
nudges.missingStakeholdersHigh: Important decisions without stakeholder buy-in fail 3× more often. Adding reviewers is recommended.
nudges.missingContext: Strategic decisions need context. Describe the goal, alternatives and expected impact.
nudges.highRisk: Risk score {{score}}% — Review by leadership recommended before the decision is approved.
nudges.similarFailed: {{count}} similar decision(s) were rejected. Review lessons learned before proceeding.
nudges.similarSuccess: {{count}} similar decisions were successful — good pattern detected.
nudges.budgetTimeline: Budget decisions benefit from clear deadlines — make sure a due date is set.

coreKpi.healthTooltip: Overall health of your decisions based on escalations, overdue items and outcome success.
coreKpi.riskTooltip: Open risks from the risk register + decisions with AI risk score ≥ 60.
coreKpi.riskFormula: Open risks + decisions with AI risk ≥ 60
coreKpi.costTooltip: Estimated cost of all open decisions (draft/review) — simplified calculation for the KPI overview.
coreKpi.costFormula: Days open × 2 persons × 2h × hourly rate × priority multiplier
coreKpi.slaTooltip: Share of active decisions with a deadline that are still on track.
coreKpi.slaFormula: Decisions with due_date ≥ today / All with due_date × 100

dqi.title: Decision Quality Index
dqi.description: Aggregated signature metric (0–100) for the overall quality of your decisions. 5 equally weighted factors of 20 points each.
dqi.forecastDesc: How accurately AI predictions match reality
dqi.source: Calculated based on all decisions, reviews and escalations
dqi.storySolid: Solid quality with room for optimization.
dqi.targetTooltip: Recommended target value for the next 90 days
dqi.goalLine: Goal: DQI from {{current}} → {{target}} | Benchmark: {{benchmark}} | Gap: {{gap}} points

cal.aiConcentration: High concentration of critical decisions ({{count}}) between {{from}} – {{to}}. Capacity planning recommended.
cal.aiOnTrack: All decisions on track. No critical bottlenecks detected.
cal.dragToAssign: Drag to a date to assign a deadline
cal.dragHint: Drag to move · Click for details

meeting.selectForRoom: Select decisions for the Decision Room ({{count}} selected)
meeting.conditionsPlaceholder: e.g. Budget limit 500k, review in Q3...

team.defaultsDesc: These defaults are automatically applied when a team member creates a new decision.

teamCmd.stableDesc: No escalations · All SLAs met · No blocked items
teamCmd.noActiveDecisionsDesc: The team has no open decision processes at the moment.
teamCmd.executionOnTrack: No blocked or overdue tasks. Execution on track.
teamCmd.noGoalsHint: Teams with clear goals make 40% faster decisions.
teamCmd.noLearningsHint: Learnings are created automatically when decisions are completed.
teamCmd.trendNegative: {{count}} learnings captured in recent decisions. Recurring risk patterns detected – process adjustment recommended.
teamCmd.trendPositive: {{count}} learnings captured in recent decisions. Mostly positive results – maintain current strategy.

teamChat.placeholder: Write a message... @ mention · /link to connect

teamImport.uploadDesc: Drag and drop PDF, CSV, Excel or text file here, or click
teamImport.analyzingDesc: Decisions are being automatically recognized and structured...
teamImport.noDecisionsHint: Try a different file or the CSV template
teamImport.formatUnsupported: File format not supported. Please use PDF, CSV, Excel or text.

notif.title: Notifications
notif.changeFilter: Change the filter or create content.

cmd.placeholder: Search pages, decisions, tasks or teams...

teamDetail.smartDefaultsDesc: Default settings for new decisions in this team.
teamDetail.slaConfigDesc: Define escalation thresholds and reassignment rules for this team.
teamDetail.deleteTeamDesc: The team and all associated data (members, invitations, messages) will be permanently deleted.
teamDetail.deleteTeamWarning: ⚠ This action cannot be undone. All decisions, tasks, and risks of this team will be lost.
teamDetail.deleteTeamConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the team "{{name}}"?

shared.cookieDesc: We use essential cookies to operate the platform. Optional cookies help us analyze usage and improve the experience.
shared.cookieBannerText: We use cookies for operation and optional analytics. Servers in Germany.
shared.cookieSettingsDesc: Manage your cookie preferences. Necessary cookies cannot be disabled.
shared.cookieCatNecessaryDesc: Auth session, CSRF protection, language setting. Required for platform operation.
shared.cookieCatAnalyticsDesc: Plausible Analytics — privacy-friendly usage analysis. No personal tracking cookies.
shared.cookieCatMarketingDesc: Currently inactive. Placeholder for future marketing integrations.
shared.offlineMsg: No internet connection — changes will not be saved.
shared.errorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Your data is safe – try again or return to the home page.
shared.queryErrorDesc: Data could not be loaded. Please try again.
shared.demoDataDesc: Load realistic test data (55 decisions, tasks, risks) to explore the platform.
shared.resetConfirm: All personal data (decisions, tasks, teams, risks) will be permanently deleted.
shared.aiDeepAnalysisDesc: Let AI uncover hidden patterns and generate actionable recommendations.
shared.aiConfidenceHighTooltip: Confidence: High — Sufficient historical data for a reliable prediction
shared.aiConfidenceMediumTooltip: Confidence: Medium — Some data points available, results may vary
shared.aiConfidenceLowTooltip: Confidence: Low — Too few data points for reliable prediction. Result is primarily AI-generated.
shared.aiSourceDataDesc: This recommendation is based on historical decision data from your organization.
shared.aiSourcePatternDesc: Similar decisions from the knowledge base were analyzed.
shared.aiSourceRuleDesc: Result is based on configured automation rules and governance policies.
shared.aiSourceBenchmarkDesc: Industry averages and best practices serve as comparison basis.
shared.aiSourceLlmDesc: Generative AI without specific data basis — results may be imprecise.
shared.aiDataPointsTooltip: Number of similar decisions used as basis

import.title: Import {{label}}
import.uploadDesc: Drag and drop a PDF, CSV, Excel, or text file here, or click to browse

onboarding.industryDesc: We'll personalize templates, benchmarks, and examples for you.
onboarding.painpointDesc: This helps us show the right features immediately.
onboarding.painAudit: Audits take weeks of manual work
onboarding.painCost: No visibility into cost of open decisions
onboarding.teamsizeDesc: This helps us recommend the right plan and features.
onboarding.decisionDesc: Create a structured decision with a template. Priority, category, and options are automatically suggested.
onboarding.teamDesc: Invite 2–3 colleagues. More people = better decisions.
onboarding.dashboardDesc: Your cockpit shows Decision Health, Risk Exposure, Cost of Delay and SLA Compliance at a glance.
onboarding.dashboardTip1: Top Action Now shows the most urgent action

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Users, analytics, and system management
admin.cantChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role.
admin.transferOwnershipDesc: Transfer the owner role to another user. You will be demoted to Admin.
admin.transferConfirmDesc: You are transferring ownership to {{name}}. You will become an Admin. Only the new owner can reverse this.
admin.auditDesc: Recent system events from the audit log.
admin.dataExportDesc: Export all decisions and tasks as CSV.
admin.backupDesc: Automatic backups are created daily and retained for 30 days.

analyticsPage.lessonsLow: Recommendation: Post-implementation reviews for more learning.
analyticsPage.costDelayVsPrev: Cost of Delay +€{{delta}} vs. previous period (top driver: {{driver}}).
analyticsPage.slaBelow: SLA Compliance at {{sla}}% – below target of 80%.
analyticsPage.qualityGood: Decision Quality Index at {{qi}}/100 – good governance.
analyticsPage.medianSlow: Median Time-to-Decision {{days}} days – check review bottlenecks.

bottleneck.label: Process Intelligence
bottleneck.title: Process Intelligence
bottleneck.help: Identifies structural issues: bottlenecks by person and category, team friction, SLA violations, and provides top 3 actions.
bottleneck.noBottlenecksDesc: Create decisions and tasks to identify structural bottlenecks.
bottleneck.recCoachSlowDesc: {{count}} persons are >50% above average. Process optimization or delegation recommended.
bottleneck.recReduceFrictionDesc: {{teams}} have high friction scores. Review escalation and blocking processes.
bottleneck.recNoCriticalDesc: The organization shows healthy decision-making speeds.

benchmarking.label: Comparison
benchmarking.title: Decision Benchmarking
benchmarking.help: Compare your decision culture with industry average and high-performance companies.
benchmarking.developmentPhaseHint: Your score improves with every completed decision — first weeks often show lower values.
benchmarking.benchmarkDisclaimer: Benchmark values are based on industry guidelines for companies in the DACH region. Values are continuously updated and refined as the user base grows.

frictionMap.label: Friction Analysis
frictionMap.title: Friction Map
frictionMap.help: Identifies friction points in the decision and task process per team.
frictionMap.noDataDesc: Create teams and assign decisions or tasks to them.

patternEngine.label: Pattern Recognition
patternEngine.title: Pattern Engine
patternEngine.noDataDesc: Create at least 2 decisions so the pattern engine can detect patterns.
patternEngine.noDataHint: The pattern engine learns from your decision history.
patternEngine.help: Detects recurring patterns in your decisions. Analyzes success rates by category, timelines, and decision-maker profiles.
patternEngine.avgProcessTimeSlow: Decisions take longer than one week.
patternEngine.draftRateHighDesc: A large portion remains in draft status.
patternEngine.recBestPriority: Priority "{{priority}}" has the best throughput rate.

analyticsPage.lessonsLow: Recommendation: Post-implementation reviews for more learning.
analyticsPage.costDelayVsPrev: Cost of Delay +€{{delta}} vs. previous period (Top driver: {{driver}}).
analyticsPage.slaBelow: SLA Compliance at {{rate}}% – below target of 80%.
analyticsPage.qualityGood: Decision Quality Index at {{qi}}/100 – good governance.
analyticsPage.medianTTDLong: Median Time-to-Decision {{days}} days – check review bottlenecks.

predictive.label: Forecast
predictive.title: Predictive Timeline
predictive.subtitle: AI-powered completion forecast based on historical patterns
predictive.helpDesc: Shows expected completion times for open decisions based on historical patterns. Critical paths and dependency chains are automatically detected.
predictive.noOpenDecisionsDesc: The timeline shows forecasts for open decisions. Create a new decision to start the prediction.
predictive.confidenceTooltip: Confidence is based on the number of comparable completed decisions. Below 50% is considered low, above 70% is reliable.

opportunityCost.label: Cost Analysis
opportunityCost.title: Opportunity Cost Radar
opportunityCost.helpDesc: Calculates daily delay costs of open decisions.
opportunityCost.urgencyTooltip: Combines €/day, priority, overdue status and decision age into a composite score.
opportunityCost.noCostsHint: Open decisions automatically generate opportunity costs

healthHeatmap.label: Health Analysis
healthHeatmap.title: Health Heatmap
healthHeatmap.helpDesc: Color-coded health analysis of your decisions and tasks by team, category, priority or type.
healthHeatmap.noHealthDataDesc: Create decisions or tasks to generate the health heatmap.
healthHeatmap.noHealthDataHint: The heatmap shows health scores for decisions and tasks
healthHeatmap.lowScoreHint: Score increases with more completed decisions and tasks.

hero.subline: SLA-driven approvals, automatic escalation and executive dashboards — so no decision gets stuck.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.emailDesc: Critical approvals buried in inboxes. No central place, no traceability.
problem.responsibilityDesc: Responsibilities are unclear, reviews drag on endlessly. Escalations come too late.
problem.auditTitle: Audits take weeks of manual work
problem.auditDesc: Compliance teams spend weeks searching for decision records that never existed.

benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.title: Decision quality becomes measurable
benefits.speedDesc: Structured templates, clear review flows and automatic reminders.
benefits.controlDesc: SLA tracking, escalation engine and complete audit trail.
benefits.aiDesc: Automatic risk analysis, what-if simulations and recommendations.
benefits.transparencyDesc: CEO briefings, health heatmap and bottleneck intelligence.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Four steps to results
howItWorks.step1Desc: Structured with templates, context and clear responsibilities.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Configurable review flows, SLA tracking and automatic escalation.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Track the status of every decision through to implementation.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Outcome tracking and pattern recognition for better decisions.

features.label: Governance Engine
features.title: Not just tracking —
features.subtitle: SLA management, escalation, risk scoring and executive dashboards — the governance infrastructure for your most important decisions.
features.copilotDesc: Your personal AI advisor analyzes every decision in real-time — risk score, success probability, and concrete recommendations.
features.graphDesc: See how your decisions are connected. Identify dependencies, critical paths and cascade effects before they become problems.
features.warRoomDesc: When things are urgent, every second counts. The War Room bundles critical decisions, escalates automatically and coordinates your team.
features.scenarioDesc: Simulate different scenarios and their impacts before committing. The AI calculates probabilities and outcomes.
features.escalationDesc: Overdue decisions are automatically escalated. Rules, thresholds and notifications — all configurable.
features.analyticsDesc: Find out where decisions get stuck, what they cost, and where the biggest optimization potentials lie.
features.recommendationText: Get feedback from the engineering team before implementation. Similar decisions had +34% success rate with technical review.

aiShowcase.title: AI that detects risks,
aiShowcase.desc: Automatic risk scoring, CEO briefings and compliance audits — AI supports your governance, not your workflow.
aiShowcase.riskScoringDesc: Automatic risk assessment based on historical data and context.
aiShowcase.ceoBriefingDesc: Daily AI-generated executive summary of all critical decisions.
aiShowcase.predictiveTimelineDesc: Predict when decisions will be completed based on team velocity.
aiShowcase.decisionDNADesc: Analyze patterns in your decisions and learn from past outcomes.
aiShowcase.complianceAuditDesc: Complete documentation for regulatory requirements and governance.
aiShowcase.strategyAlignmentDesc: Link every decision to strategic goals and measure impact.

useCases.label: Industries
useCases.title: Built for regulated industries
useCases.financeDesc: Audit-proof approval workflows for credit decisions, compliance reports and regulatory documentation — NIS2 and GDPR compliant.
useCases.pharmaDesc: Structured decision processes for clinical trials, M&A evaluations and portfolio prioritization with complete audit trail.
useCases.scaleupDesc: Fast decisions without chaos. OKR alignment, automatic escalation and AI-powered risk scoring for growing teams.
useCases.publicDesc: Audit-proof documentation, multi-level approval processes and full transparency for committee decisions.

testimonials.label: Example Feedback
testimonials.disclaimer: * Illustrative example feedback based on typical results from our pilot projects. Names and companies are fictional.
testimonials.title: Measurable results from regulated industries
testimonials.quote1: Our decision cycles are significantly faster. What used to take weeks, we now do in days — with a complete audit trail.
testimonials.quote2: We made cost-of-delay visible for the first time — losses that would have gone unnoticed. ROI was positive quickly.
testimonials.quote3: Escalations dropped significantly. Our board has full transparency over all ongoing decisions for the first time — NIS2-ready.

stats.socialProof: Built for teams in these industries

cta.desc: Every open decision costs your company money every day — make that loss visible, measurable and solvable.
cta.socialProof: Built for teams in Finance, Pharma and Scale-Ups.

footer.tagline: Decision Governance Platform — Decisions visible, measurable, solvable.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Decivio GmbH. All rights reserved. EU-Hosting (Frankfurt).

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent pricing for
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your organization.
pricing.addonsSubtitle: Expand step by step — only pay for what you need.
pricing.roiSubtitle: How much does your company save with structured decision governance?
pricing.roiBasedOn: Based on averages: 42% faster cycles, 73% fewer escalations, 75% less manual overhead.
pricing.roiMethod1: Time savings: (12 − 7 days) × decisions × 8h × 30% productivity factor × hourly rate
pricing.roiMethod2: Escalation costs: escalation rate difference × 16h effort per escalation × hourly rate
pricing.roiMethod3: Overhead reduction: (2h − 0.5h) meeting time × 4 weeks × team size × hourly rate
pricing.valueFootnote: Just one avoided bottleneck can pay for the annual price multiple times.
pricing.ctaSubtitle: Start today with structured decision governance.
pricing.starterDesc: For small teams up to 10 people.
pricing.starterIdeal: Structure and control for small teams.
pricing.proDesc: For growing companies with up to 50 users.
pricing.proIdeal: Most popular plan — full power for growing companies.
pricing.enterpriseDesc: For organizations with advanced governance and compliance requirements.
pricing.faq1a: Monthly or annually. Annual billing gives 20% discount — that's 2 months free.
pricing.faq2q: Do I need a credit card for the Free plan?
pricing.faq2a: No. The Free plan is completely usable without a credit card.
pricing.faq3q: Can we upgrade at any time?
pricing.faq4q: What happens after the 100 AI analyses in Starter?
pricing.faq4a: The quota renews monthly. Optionally, the AI Analysis Boost (€29/mo for +500 analyses) can be added.
pricing.faq5a: Row-Level Security, encrypted storage (AES-256), MFA, EU hosting and audit-proof audit trail — NIS2/GDPR compliant.
pricing.faq6a: Yes — Extra User Blocks (€19/10 users), AI Analysis Boost (€29/mo), Extended Audit Trail (€19/mo), Decision Room Pro (€39/mo), Benchmarking (€49/mo), Custom Branding (€29/mo) and API Access (€99/mo).
pricing.addonUsersDesc: Expand user quota without plan upgrade
pricing.addonRoomDesc: War Room mode, guest access, Meeting Protocol 2.0

tour.dashboardDesc: Track all your team's decisions in real-time. See status, priorities and progress at a glance.
tour.aiDesc: Our AI analyzes risks, dependencies and success probabilities for every decision automatically.
tour.teamDesc: Stakeholder alignment, review workflows and discussions — all in one place for transparent decisions.
tour.graphDesc: Understand complex dependencies between decisions and identify bottlenecks before they arise.
tour.ctaDesc: Start for free — no credit card needed. Set up in 5 minutes.
tour.aiRecommendationText: Based on historical data, I recommend conducting a stakeholder review before implementation. Similar decisions had a 23% higher success rate with this step.
tour.freePlan: Free plan available · No credit card

warRoom.title: War Room
warRoom.helpDesc: Real-time situational awareness for critical situations. Shows active escalations, blocked decisions and required actions at a glance. Ideal for status meetings.
warRoom.accessRestrictedDesc: The Executive War Room is only accessible to administrators. Contact your admin to gain access.
warRoom.riskStaleDetail: {{count}} decisions with no progress for >14 days
warRoom.riskQualityDetail: {{rate}}% of decisions this month were rejected
warRoom.noRisksDetail: The system is running stable. Continue monitoring.

auditTrail.title: Audit Trail
auditTrail.subtitle: Revision-proof governance transparency – Immutable Log
auditTrail.helpDesc: Complete, non-deletable change history of all decisions. Filter by source, type or compliance relevance.
auditTrail.stabilityTooltip: Based on: Rework rate, status flips, escalation frequency, SLA violations, override rate
auditTrail.overridesDetail: Approved decisions were reset to Draft/Review.
auditTrail.escalationsDetail: High escalation rate indicates structural governance issues.
auditTrail.immutableNotice: Immutable Log – Entries cannot be deleted or modified. All actions are revision-proof with timestamp and user ID.
auditTrail.tryOtherFilters: Try different filters or search terms.
auditTrail.autoLogged: All changes to decisions are automatically logged here.
auditTrail.immutableEntry: Immutable – This entry cannot be modified or deleted.

automationRules.title: Automation Rules
automationRules.subtitle: Governance automation – Rules, impact & compliance
automationRules.helpDesc: Create rules that automatically execute actions when certain conditions are met.
automationRules.engineInactiveDesc: Activate at least one rule to start the Governance Engine.
automationRules.onboardingDesc: Create your first automation rule or use a template to get started instantly.
automationRules.healthEmptyDesc: Create your first rule to calculate the Health Score.
automationRules.healthTooltip: Based on: Rule coverage (30%), Active rules (20%), Execution frequency (25%), Conflicts (15%), Engine status (10%)
automationRules.noRulesYet: No rules created yet. Use templates to get started.
automationRules.deactivationSim: Deactivation simulation: {{count}} SLA violations would have occurred in the last 30 days.
automationRules.presetHighSlaDesc: Automatically sets a 3-day SLA when priority is set to High
automationRules.presetCriticalEscDesc: Automatically escalates when a critical decision is created
automationRules.presetBudgetCfoDesc: Notifies on every new budget decision
automationRules.presetStrategicSlaDesc: Strategic decisions automatically get a 5-day SLA
automationRules.presetHighRiskDesc: Automatically escalates when risk score exceeds 60
automationRules.presetRisk80Desc: Sets priority to Critical when risk score exceeds 80

scenarioEngine.label: Simulation
scenarioEngine.title: Scenario Engine
scenarioEngine.subtitle: Simulate company-wide impacts when decisions are delayed.
scenarioEngine.help: Simulate what happens when decisions are delayed. Select individual or all decisions and adjust the delay to calculate cascade effects and costs.
scenarioEngine.noDecisionsDesc: Create decisions to simulate delay scenarios and cascade effects.
scenarioEngine.noDecisionsHint: The simulation analyzes costs and risks from delays
scenarioEngine.noTargetsDesc: No open decisions found for these filters.
scenarioEngine.noCascade: No cascade effects found – create dependencies in the Decision Graph.
scenarioEngine.runSimTooltip: Simulates the delay for {{count}} selected decisions
scenarioEngine.monteCarloTooltip: Probability that actual costs will reach or exceed this value (based on 1,000 simulation runs).
scenarioEngine.riskBarTooltip: Distribution of simulation results: Left (green) = Best Case, right (red) = Worst Case. Width shows probability.

decisionDna.label: Diagnostics
decisionDna.title: Decision DNA
decisionDna.help: Deep analysis of your decision patterns with actionable recommendations.
decisionDna.riskInsightLow: Only {{pct}}% of high-risk decisions are implemented.
decisionDna.highPerformanceDesc: Fast decisions, strong implementation, good networking, high task throughput.
decisionDna.agileDesc: Fast with high implementation rate and solid task throughput.
decisionDna.decisionStrongExecWeakDesc: Good decision rate, but weak task execution.
decisionDna.insufficientData: Insufficient data for a reliable calculation
decisionDna.speedProfileEmptyHint: Create decisions in different categories to see the speed profile.

escalationEngine.title: Decision Control
escalationEngine.subtitle: Governance Center: SLA, Escalations, Economic Exposure & Automation
escalationEngine.help: Central control for governance, escalations, SLA compliance, and automated rules.
escalationEngine.engineOnboardingDesc: Create your first automation rule to activate the engine.
escalationEngine.warRoomTooltip: Real-time crisis mode for escalated decisions with highest urgency.
escalationEngine.engineConfirmDesc: The engine will review all open decisions and execute automatic actions (escalations, reassigns, review skips). These actions cannot be undone.
escalationEngine.urgencyFormula: Priority × 20 + Overdue bonus + Age × 1.5 + Risk × 15 + Escalation × 20 + Dependencies × 5 + Cost-of-Delay factor
escalationEngine.staleDetail: {{reviewCount}} in review status, {{budgetCount}} affect budget. Avg. delay: +{{avgDelay}} days.
escalationEngine.staleRec: Shorten review deadline, activate auto-reminders, enforce escalation after 10 days
escalationEngine.escalationWaveDetail: {{critCount}} of those on critical decisions. Pattern: High risk + review bottlenecks.
escalationEngine.escalationWaveRec: Analyze escalation causes, increase review capacity
escalationEngine.blockedDetail: Dependency chains prevent progress in the pipeline.
escalationEngine.blockedRec: Prioritize critical dependencies in Decision Room
escalationEngine.smartEscalationDesc: Automatic escalation based on priority and inactivity
escalationEngine.smartEscalationTrigger: Deadline exceeded or inactivity > SLA threshold

templates.helpDesc: Predefined decision templates with review flows and approval chains
templates.selectHint: Click a template to see details.
templates.approvalChainDesc: Each decision of this type goes through the following approval stages.
templates.requiredFieldsDesc: These fields must be filled in when creating a decision.
templates.governanceRulesDesc: Compliance and governance notes for this decision type.

processHub.reviewDurationTrend: Avg. review duration {{change}}% vs last month
processHub.recDelegationDesc: {{count}} reviewer(s) over capacity. Set up delegation.
processHub.recSlaPreventDesc: {{count}} decisions at risk of expiring in 5 days.
processHub.recRiskAutoDesc: {{count}} high-risk decisions without automatic escalation. Recommendation: automation rule for Risk Score > 60.
processHub.recAutoReviewDesc: {{rate}}% rejection rate. Recommendation: automatic review assignment for {{category}} decisions.
processHub.recSlaAutoDesc: {{count}} category(ies) with decisions without SLA. Automation can set deadlines automatically.

taskDetail.aiRiskAssessment: AI risk assessment of the decision
taskDetail.aiBlockedMsg: Resolve blockage first – this task directly impacts the progress of a linked decision.
taskDetail.aiOverdueMsg: Task is overdue and potentially delays the linked decision. Immediate action recommended.
taskDetail.aiCriticalMsg: This task is part of a critical decision. Prioritized processing can reduce delay costs.
taskDetail.aiOnTrackMsg: Task is on track. Document progress regularly to ensure transparency for stakeholders.
taskDetail.title: Title

executiveDash.subtitle: Executive Level
executiveDash.noDataDesc: Create decisions for KPIs and analytics.
executiveDash.helpDesc: Management cockpit: KPI Snapshot, Risk Radar, critical decisions, Economic Impact and AI briefing.
executiveDash.criticalSortedBy: sorted by Economic Impact × Risk × Delay
executiveDash.noCostDrivers: No open decisions with cost impact.
executiveDash.calcTooltip: Calculation: Days open × hourly rate × 8h/week × priority multiplier (Critical 4×, High 2.5×, Medium/Low 1.5×).
executiveDash.avgWait: No review in the last {{days}} days
executiveDash.briefDesc: AI-generated summary with top risks, open escalations, cost-of-delay analysis and recommended actions – based on your current decision data.
executiveDash.durationTooltip: Median duration from creation to implementation of all implemented decisions.
executiveDash.implTooltip: Percentage of decisions with status 'Implemented' out of all team decisions.
executiveDash.boardPackExportedDesc: Contains: KPI overview, Risk Radar, critical decisions, cost-of-delay and team performance.
executiveDash.actSlaTimer: Activate SLA timer for overdue decisions
executiveDash.actDecisionRoom: Handle critical decisions in Decision Room
executiveDash.radarRiskExpl: Proportion of decisions without high risk
executiveDash.fallbackOverdueRate: Overdue rate at {{rate}}% – escalation process recommended.

archivePage.pageDesc: Enterprise Governance: Archiving, retention, compliance export and decision traceability.
archivePage.confirmDelete: Permanently delete decision? Audit entries will be preserved.
archivePage.deleteError: Error deleting – only org admins can permanently delete.
archivePage.trashWarning: Deleted decisions can be restored. Audit entries are never deleted.
archivePage.trashWarningAdmin: Only admins can permanently delete entries.
archivePage.trashEmptyDesc: Deleted decisions appear here and can be restored.
archivePage.retentionAdminOnly: Only admins can configure the Retention Policy.
archivePage.autoArchiveDesc: Automatically archive implemented decisions after {{days}} days.
archivePage.lcAuditNote: ⚠ Audit logs are NEVER deleted – neither by soft delete nor by retention policies.
archivePage.exportJsonDesc: Full structured export of all data. Ideal for backups and migration.
archivePage.exportCsvDesc: Tabular export for Excel and analysis tools.
archivePage.exportAuditDesc: Compliance export with all changes, SLA violations and escalations.
archivePage.exportBoardDesc: Management report with metrics, risk overviews and AI recommendations.
archivePage.complianceDesc: Creates a comprehensive export with all decisions, status changes, timestamps, SLA violations, escalations and risk histories. Ideal for audit and review.
archivePage.privacyLine1: Your export only contains data you have access to
archivePage.privacyLine2: Soft-deleted decisions are included in the export (with deleted_at marker)
archivePage.privacyLine3: Audit logs are always fully included in the export
archivePage.privacyLine4: The export is client-side – no data is sent to third parties
archivePage.privacyLine5: Personal data can be anonymized before export

decisionDetail.openTasksWarning: {{count}} open task(s) linked — must be completed.
decisionDetail.detailsAbove: Detail information is shown above on this page.
decisionDetail.recHighRisk: Risk review by second stakeholder recommended. Run scenario analysis.
decisionDetail.recAllComplete: All reviews completed. Decision can be approved.

timeline.title: Decision Timeline
timeline.helpDesc: Chronological view of all decision, task, review and escalation events
timeline.tryOtherFilters: Try different filters or search terms.
timeline.timelineDesc: The timeline shows all activities chronologically — created decisions, status changes, reviews, completed tasks and escalations.

graph.title: Decision Graph
graph.helpDesc: Visualizes dependencies between decisions. Open a decision and switch to the 'Dependencies' tab to create links (blocks, influences, requires). Click a node for cascade analysis.
graph.emptyDesc: Create decisions and link them to visually identify dependencies, critical paths and cascade effects.

teamPerf.title: Team Performance Comparison
teamPerf.subtitle: KPIs of all teams in direct comparison
teamPerf.hint: Compares velocity, completion rate, open risks and review speed of all teams.
teamPerf.volumeRelative: Volume relative to most active team

templateEditor.noTemplates: No templates in the database yet.
templateEditor.title: Template Editor
templateEditor.healthWarning: This template meets less than 60% of governance requirements. Please fill in missing areas.
templateEditor.usagePlaceholder: When should this template be used?
templateEditor.govFieldsTooltip: Adds standard compliance fields: Budget Impact (currency), ROI Estimate (percent), and Risk Assessment (matrix).
templateEditor.validationTooltip: Empty = no validation. Examples: 'required' (mandatory), '> 0' (minimum value), 'max:100' (maximum value). Separate multiple rules with commas.
templateEditor.duplicateNameError: A template named "{{name}}" already exists. Please choose a different name.
templateEditor.govPlaceholder:
Structured policy rules, e.g.:
• Budget > 10,000 → CFO required
• ROI field must be filled
• Risk assessment is mandatory
templateEditor.govAutoHint: These rules are applied automatically via conditional rules and automations.
templateEditor.reviewerNotified: Reviewers are notified on new reviews
templateEditor.automationHint: Automations are managed in the Automation Engine → Settings / Automations
templateEditor.noDecisionsYet: No decisions created with this template yet.
templateEditor.autoVersionHint: Each save automatically creates a new version.

slaConfig.errorDesc: Some SLA configurations could not be saved.
slaConfig.helpText: Warning: Hours before deadline for first warning. Urgent: Level 2. Overdue: Level 3 (0 = at deadline). Reassign: Days of inactivity until automatic reassignment.
slaConfig.emptyDesc: Default SLA times are being used. SLA rules can be created by an administrator.

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
mfa.description: Protect your account with a second factor at login.
mfa.bothMethodsHint: Both methods active – authenticator app is preferred at login.
mfa.scanQr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.
mfa.emailSent: A 6-digit code has been sent to {{email}}.
mfa.emailSendPrompt: We'll send you a verification code by email.
mfa.deactivateTotpDesc: Your account will be less protected. You'll need to set up the authenticator app again if re-enabling.
mfa.deactivateEmailDesc: Email code verification will no longer be required at login.
mfa.invalidCodeDesc: Please check the code and try again.
mfa.backupCodesDesc: One-time codes for emergencies when you can't access your device.
mfa.backupCodesWarning: Store these codes securely. They are only shown once.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetPassword.successSent: If an account with this email exists, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
resetPassword.changed: Password changed successfully! You will be redirected...

globalSearch.label: Search
globalSearch.title: Global Search
globalSearch.placeholder: Search decisions, tasks, lessons, risks, comments…
globalSearch.minChars: Enter at least 2 characters to search
globalSearch.showingFirst50: Showing the first 50 results. Refine your search for more specific results.

pilot.title: Feature Management
pilot.subtitle: Enable only the modules your team needs during the pilot. Disabled modules are hidden from navigation.
pilot.pilotActiveTooltip: In pilot mode you can enable and disable modules at any time to test the platform. Your data is preserved when disabling.
pilot.disableDescription: will be removed from navigation. Your data remains fully preserved and is instantly available when you re-enable the module.

upgrade.executiveDesc: Strategic overview with CEO briefing, board reports, and organization-wide KPIs — built for leadership.
upgrade.analyticsDesc: Deep analytics on decision quality, cycle times, and team performance with interactive charts.
upgrade.bottlenecksDesc: Identify bottlenecks in your decision processes with friction maps and flow analysis.
upgrade.auditDesc: Complete traceability of all decision changes — essential for compliance and governance.
upgrade.engineDesc: Automatic escalations, SLA monitoring, and rule-based workflows for consistent decision-making.
upgrade.calendarDesc: Visualize deadlines and planned reviews in an intuitive calendar view.
upgrade.risksDesc: Capture, assess, and link risks to decisions for comprehensive risk management.
upgrade.teamsDesc: Organize your team with roles, responsibilities, and cross-team collaboration.
upgrade.dashboardDesc: Your personal cockpit with KPIs, open tasks, and current decision status.
upgrade.decisionsDesc: Create, manage, and track all decisions with structured workflows.
upgrade.tasksDesc: Task management directly linked to your decisions — nothing gets lost.
upgrade.genericDesc: {{feature}} is not included in your current plan. Upgrade for access to this feature.

predictiveSla.title: Predictive SLA Warnings
predictiveSla.tooltipDelay: Based on {{name}}'s past behavior, this decision will likely be completed {{days}} days after the SLA deadline.
predictiveSla.allClear: No SLA violations predicted — all reviewers on track.
predictiveSla.predictedDelay: Predicted delay: {{days}} days past SLA deadline

terminology.title: Language & Terminology
terminology.description: Customize terms for your organization. Changes apply everywhere in the application.

freemium.decisionLimitDesc: You've reached the {{count}} decisions of the Free plan. Upgrade to Starter for unlimited decisions.
freemium.teamsLockedDesc: Teams, invitations, and collaboration are available starting from the Starter plan.
freemium.inviteLockedDesc: Team invitations are not available on the Free plan. Upgrade to Starter.

notifMatrix.pushNote: Push notifications require browser permission. WhatsApp must be verified under Settings → WhatsApp.
notifMatrix.reengagementDesc: Reminders after extended inactivity (day 7, 14, 30) with open decisions and cost-of-delay.
